remarks: 19 Ketchum is for sale as part of 31 Franklin parcel with 2 building next door combined price $2,750,000. Ketchum and Franklin Street are about to be transformed as part of area redevelopment including 17 townhomes and flats across street recently approved. As well as the dev site at train station. Now is the time.
